summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of WealthDock with blue theme, modern fonts, and Life OS features. All major functionality working correctly including Total Wealth banner, Calendar view, and habit tracker with circular dots.

flaky_endpoints.workaround: Export master CSV works as alternative
Export master CSV works as alternative
Export master CSV works as alternative

Calendar date clicking shows transaction details
Life OS page shows year progress ring (22% completed)
Life OS displays days remaining stats (9 month, 284 year)
Habit tracker grid with 217 circular dots working
7 habits loaded: 5 prayers + Healthy Diet + Gym
Add Habit dialog opens and accepts input
Add Goal dialog opens and accepts input
Navigation between all pages (Dashboard, Calendar, Life OS) works

Life OS API endpoint working with habit data
No JavaScript errors or UI errors found
